systems.system_notes: Portfolio-level public anchor for Arthrex arthroscopic resection and meniscectomy workflow resources.

components.component_notes: Official Arthrex portfolio sources describe the broader arthroscopic resection and meniscectomy workflow family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: This is a portfolio-level row rather than a single resection system, so no dedicated tray is asserted in this pass.
